name: Suspicious PowerShell Execution
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell execution patterns commonly used in attacks including encoded commands and download cradles.
query: process where process.name == "powershell.exe" and (process.args : ("-enc", "-EncodedCommand", "IEX", "Invoke-Expression", "DownloadString", "WebClient") or process.command_line : ("*-enc *", "*hidden*", "*bypass*"))

name: Brute Force Login Attempt
description: Detects multiple failed authentication attempts from a single source indicating a brute force attack.

name: Data Exfiltration via DNS
description: Detects potential data exfiltration through unusually long DNS queries or high-frequency DNS requests to uncommon domains.

name: Ransomware File Activity
description: Detects file system activity consistent with ransomware including mass file modifications and known ransomware extensions.
query: file where file.extension : ("encrypted", "locked", "crypted", "crypt", "enc") and process.name != null

name: Lateral Movement via SMB
description: Detects lateral movement activity using SMB protocol including remote service creation and admin share access.
query: network where network.transport == "tcp" and destination.port == 445 and process.name != null and network.direction == "outbound"
